emiratesid.ae.biometrics
Class FTP_Template

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.biometrics.FTP_Template

public class FTP_Template
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
This class represents the converted template, see convertImage of the Biometric Facade

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
FTP_Template()
           
 
Method Summary
 int getFingerIndex()
          Retrieves current template finger index
 char[] getFingerprint()
          Get the template minitiae
 int getFormat()
          Retrieves current fingerprint template format
static FTP_Template getInstance(java.lang.String path, int format, int fingerIndex)
          Construct an FTP_Template object from a file system
 void inverseY()
          Inverse the Y value of all minutiae Y = 0xFF - Y; this funcion is used to convert ISO template into DINV or a DINV template into an ISO one
 void orderMinutiae()
          Orders current template minutiae
 char[] prepareDataForOncardMatching()
          Prepares the current template data to be ready for matching operations
 void setFingerIndex(int fingerIndex)
           
 void setFingerprint(char[] fingerprint)
          Set the list of minutiuae of the template
 void setFormat(int format)

getFormat

public int getFormat()
Retrieves current fingerprint template format

Returns:
format

setFormat

public void setFormat(int format)

getInstance

public static FTP_Template getInstance(java.lang.String path,
                                       int format,
                                       int fingerIndex)
Construct an FTP_Template object from a file system

Parameters:
path - file containing the minutiae
format - the format of the template ISO or DINV
fingerIndex - the finger index
Returns:
FTP_Template object of the loaded file

inverseY

public void inverseY()
Inverse the Y value of all minutiae Y = 0xFF - Y; this funcion is used to convert ISO template into DINV or a DINV template into an ISO one

prepareDataForOncardMatching

public char[] prepareDataForOncardMatching()
Prepares the current template data to be ready for matching operations

Returns:
prepared data

orderMinutiae

public void orderMinutiae()
Orders current template minutiae
